vocab.example: From the summit, I was treated to a panoramic view of the entire valley, stretching as far as the eye could see.

vocab.meaning: vẻ đẹp tự nhiên nguyên sơ
vocab.example: The remote islands in Palawan boast a pristine natural beauty that remains largely untouched by mass tourism.

vocab.meaning: một cảnh tượng đáng để chiêm ngưỡng
vocab.example: The Northern Lights dancing across the Arctic sky was truly a sight to behold, leaving everyone in absolute silence.

vocab.meaning: phong cảnh rực rỡ, sống động
vocab.example: I was captivated by the vivid landscapes of the terraced rice fields in Mu Cang Chai during the harvest season.
The countryside was characterized by rolling hills covered in a lush carpet of emerald green grass.

vocab.meaning: điểm dừng chân ngắm cảnh (thường ở trên cao)
vocab.example: We pulled over at a scenic overlook to admire the winding river below as it cut through the limestone mountains.

vocab.meaning: đường bờ biển ngập tràn ánh nắng
vocab.example: Driving along the sun-drenched coastline of the Amalfi Coast provided some of the most memorable vistas of my trip.
Beyond natural scenery, the architectural marvels of the Sagrada Familia in Barcelona are among the most beautiful sights I've witnessed.
The serene atmosphere of the ancient pagoda at sunrise created a picture-perfect moment of spiritual beauty.

vocab.meaning: sự hùng vĩ/quy mô to lớn của
vocab.example: It’s hard to comprehend the sheer scale of the Himalayas until you are standing at the base of those giants.
